title: Projection Accountability
description: Discloses the projection, purpose, preserved properties, and known distortions of a map rendering, so a projected view is never presented without a visible source, projection, date, scale, and uncertainty state. Governs any map view; does not itself store coordinates (see schemas/location-evidence.schema.json). First draft, not yet reviewed by Kemi.

map_view_id.description: Identifier for the specific rendered map view this record accounts for.

projection.description: e.g. Web Mercator, Equal Earth, Africa-centered azimuthal.
